name: Ant Workshop
short_description: BAFTA, Develop and TIGA Award nominated Edinburgh studio making original IP with character and a quirky sense of humour
about: Ant Workshop is a BAFTA, Develop and TIGA Award nominated studio founded in January 2015 by Tony Gowland to focus on developing original IP full of character and with a quirky sense of humour. As well as their own titles, they've also helped bring over a dozen cool games (such as John Wick Hex, Yes Your Grace, and Thomas Was Alone) to current and next generation console platforms.
